rulings.Case Title: REBECCA TRAN VS. ARMEN RAFAELIAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 15, 2019 line 11. PLAINTIFF REBECCA TRAN DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend. Defendant shall have 5 days to file an amended answer stating facts in support of defenses 2, 5, 6, and 8. As to purported affirmative defenses 7 and 9, the Court will treat the demurrer as a motion to strike and will grant it with leave to amend for Defendant to allege these purported affirmative defenses in conformity with the laws of this state. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: GEORGE PAUL HE-SEMFIELD VS. ZHEN ZHEN HU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 15, 2019 line 12. DEFENDANT ZHEN HU, RUI SITU DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Notice is fatally defective. Regulation 12.14 in relevant part requires: "(8) a declaration executed by the landlord under penalty of perjury stating: (i) the reason why the landlord … is moving from his/her current residence to the unit for which possession is being sought; (ii) that the landlord seeks to recover possession of the unit … for use or occupancy as the principal residence of the landlord." The reading of the Regulation urged by the landlord would make subsections (i) and the quoted part of subsection (ii) redundant, rendering subsection (i) superfluous. Declaration provides no reason (other than repeating the language of SFRO) for moving from the current residence to the unit at issue in this action. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: FRANCISCOS'S MEXICAN FOODS LLC VS. KEITH PULLIAM ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 15, 2019 line 13. DEFENDANT KEITH PULLIAM DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that Notice has to include information as to the calculation of three days. Furthermore, allegations in the complaint are sufficient to show the amount of rent vs. daily damages sought in the Notice and Complaint. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ANTON HALTEH VS. DAVID MORGANSTERN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 15, 2019 line 14. DEFENDANT DAVID MORGANSTERN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to clearly allege (1) whether tenancy is subject to SFRO, but is for some reason exempt, e.g. landlord lives in the same unit by properly filling out paragraph 14; or (2) tenancy is not subject to SFRO, e.g. Certificate of Occupancy issued in 2018 by filling out, for example, paragraph 15. =(501/CFH)
